text_block_list.text:
It was a few days before summer training camp. 
Lucky Lilac handed me a certain something special.
choice_data_list: A ticket to an event dinner?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Mmhm. A friend of mine ended up giving it to me a bit ago… 
It so happens that the restaurant venue's right by the campsite. 
Are ya interested?
choice_data_list: I sure am! Thanks for asking!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: And thank ya for accepting. Now that it's decided, there is one thing I have to ask of ya. See, the restaurant has a dress code——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Oh. Heehee, that suit really does suit ya, doesn't it? 
Worth all the effort of picking it out.

I was wearing the suit the two of us picked out before. 
It'd become one of my favorite outfits.
choice_data_list: That dress looks good on you too, Luck!
That dress looks good on you too, Luck!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank ya very much. 
——Now then… Shall we? It's just a short walk till we get there.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
My goodness… This restaurant really is something. 
The pictures on the site don't do it justice.

The restaurant's lighting glittered, gently enveloping the room. 
The atmosphere was incredibly refined, and the place was even 
quieter than I expected it would be.
choice_data_list: (Not the best place to crack a joke.)
(Not the best place to crack a joke.)

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Is the place putting ya on edge a little?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's written all over your face. It is the sort of place ya'd expect to see celebrities… Not exactly what ya'd call familiar, now is it?
choice_data_list: I still like it, though.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
That's good to hear. 
Now, let's the two of us enjoy this quiet evening, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——That was delicious. What was it called… Poisson à la vapeur? It's the first I've had it. I very much enjoyed its light, refreshing taste.
choice_data_list: The orange sauce was great too.
The orange sauce was great too.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Mm, yes it was. It added that little hint of sweetness… 
………Heehee.
choice_data_list: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
……Now, don't take this the wrong way… But it's refreshing, 
seeing ya all dressed up, not cracking any jokes.
choice_data_list: ……It's not like I'm ALWAYS joking…
……It's not like I'm ALWAYS joking…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't worry, I know ya always take everything seriously. 
And I know that 'everything' includes your jokes.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……So that's why I should also——

choice_data_list: ? …Whoa! Luck, look!

text_block_list.text:
Looking outside the window, we saw fireworks bursting in the 
air not too far away. The sudden flash of bright colors took me 
by surprise… I couldn't take my eyes off them.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Oh, my……! Ain't that lovely…
choice_data_list: Looks like the fire's really working…
Looks like the fire's really working…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. 
A firework's supposed to make the fire… 
…Wait, huh?
choice_data_list: Huh? ………Oops.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Pfft…………Haha! 
…So ya wanted to crack some jokes after all, huh?
choice_data_list: No, that wasn't it…!

text_block_list.text:
I panicked and tried to deny it, but Lucky Lilac looked at me 
with a kind face. Seeing her gentle smile, I felt the knots in my 
stomach start to come loose…

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Fire working… Fireworks… 
……Pffhaha!
choice_data_list: W-Was it really that funny…?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry. It just really hit my funny bone for some reason… 
The atmosphere there must've made me drop my guard.

……Still, it wasn't every day that a single gag would get her 
to laugh that hard. This would make good material for the 
future, so I reached into my bag and pulled out my notebook.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh… So ya brought that notebook with ya, huh? 
Say, how's your comedy research going?
choice_data_list: Pretty good. I've got a lot more material.
Pretty good. I've got a lot more material.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……Passionate as ever, ain't ya.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
To tell ya the truth… I had my doubts about making ya do 
all this comedy stuff.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
But… I think it's all right. 
…In fact, I like it this way.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: Because you're not actually a manzai comedian, see? It's not like ya've got a whole crowd watchin' ya.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: All ya have… Is an audience of one.

I looked at Lucky Lilac's smile. 
The smile of the one and only foil to my one and only fool.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
You're the kind of person who always gives it their all. 
So believe me, I understand exactly how hard you're working 
to make me enjoy myself.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
If you're working hard, then I've gotta do my part. 
——And match that passion.

Each of her words, meant for my ears only, struck my heart 
one after another. My own words failed me… So the only sounds 
around us were the waves gently crashing on the shore.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: So let's do a manzai show!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
I mean, ya've been trainin' your goofs for me, haven't ya? 
C'mon, I've seen how much ya've got written in those notes.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
And I'm the only foil that can match all those gags. 
Trust me, I know your jokes better than anyone, so I can 
'yes and' any bit ya throw at me!
choice_data_list: (W-Whaaaat!?)

text_block_list.text:
Everything was moving so fast, my brain couldn't keep up. 
But I was so happy she was willing to go along with it that——
choice_data_list: ………All right, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——Heh heh. That's the way, partner.

With her leading my by the hand, we walked to a secluded 
spot further down the beach. By the ocean, without a soul 
in sight, we began our limited show, live for one night only——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Well… It's summer camp, so I guess we'd better do some 
training. We'll start with some warm-ups, right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: <size=32>Y-Yeah! Start with 5 sets with running on water!</size>
<size=32>Y-Yeah! Start with 5 sets with running on water!</size>

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ! ——I can't friggin' do dat! Dat's a very specific skill for a very specific type of racer. How's about ya give me somethin' normal to do!
choice_data_list: How about some laps on the beach?

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Now that I like! If I don't move fast, then my feet'll sink into the 
sand. That's the perfect kinda training to build up my speed.
choice_data_list: We'll get an ostrich to partner run.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: We ain't on no skill-up island! Do ya see an ostrich around here?! All right, to heck wit speed training! Let's hurry up and do da next one!
choice_data_list: Give me a minute to pump the giant tire.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Geez, talk about guts training! No way can ya blow up dat tire 
all by yourself! Besides, ya know how friggin' big the tires at 
the academy get!
choice_data_list: …Ugh! This is doing a number on my abs!!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: We're here to train me, remember! You're runnin' out of energy here! Forget it, how about we take a break? Let's go over to the shore.
choice_data_list: No. We're doing a quiz show.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: WHY!? Sure, some people do do dat at training camp! In fact they're ALWAYS doing it like it's normal!
choice_data_list: Ope. Summer camp's over.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: What, already!? We didn't train dis summer at all! We're gonna need two YEARS' worth of summer training if we wanna get back on pace!
choice_data_list: Well, that's not really possible.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so NOW ya wanna be reasonable! 
Naw, I'm done! Dat's all, folks!

We bowed at each other to mark the end of our show. 
And when we raised our heads, we found ourselves face to face. 
Our improv was so funny that we couldn't help but——

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ……………Pf. Pfft—— Pfahahahaha!
choice_data_list: ……Pfft. Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text:
Whew… Ya know, it ain't so bad every once in a while, letting 
loose and clapping back like this.
choice_data_list: That was really fun!
That was really fun!

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ………… Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Lucky Lilac
text_block_list.text: ——It really was.
